name: Penn Jersey Diesel & Trailer (Bensalem Travel Plaza)
description: The segment's only full-service truck stop, less than a mile from I-95 Exit 37 (Street Rd). Offers 24/7 diesel with DEF (on-road and off-road), a CAT scale, convenience store/deli, showers, laundry, truck wash, tire repair and truck/trailer parking.

name: CAT Scale at Penn Jersey Diesel Bensalem
description: CAT Scale #1316 located at the Penn Jersey Diesel & Trailer / Bensalem Travel Plaza fuel island off I-95 Exit 37. Certified truck weigh scale available to the public.

name: Philadelphia I-95 Truck & Trailer Park
description: Secure, gated and guarded 24/7 truck/trailer parking lot less than a mile from I-95 Exit 37, with 40+ short-term spaces, security cameras, and an adjacent diesel/DEF fuel island and CAT scale.

name: McCarthy Tire Service - Philadelphia
description: Commercial fleet tire dealer and service center on State Rd in Northeast Philadelphia near I-95, servicing trucks, buses, RVs and trailers with Bridgestone/Firestone commercial tires.

name: McCarthy Tire Service - Levittown
description: Large 40,000 sq ft commercial tire facility about two miles from I-95 and the PA Turnpike, handling tire sales and service for commercial trucks, buses, industrial and off-the-road equipment, plus fleet service.

name: PA Truck Center
description: Truck and trailer service and repair shop in Northeast Philadelphia, about one mile from I-95 Exit 32, handling routine maintenance through major truck repairs.

name: Burns Auto Group - Truck Repair
description: Diesel and fleet truck repair shop on US-1 (Lincoln Hwy) in Fairless Hills near I-95, offering diesel engine, brake/axle and transmission service with ASE-certified technicians and fleet accounts.

name: Rob's Automotive & Collision Center
description: 24/7 heavy-duty truck towing, recovery and repair on PA-413 (Veterans Hwy) in Bristol near I-95 Exit 40; a preferred towing provider for the Pennsylvania State Police and PA Turnpike, also handling trailer service and commercial hauling.

name: Quala Tank Wash (Bensalem)
description: Commercial tank truck cleaning/wash facility in Bensalem near I-95 Exit 37, providing interior tank and trailer cleaning services for commercial carriers.

name: Gladiator Trucker Academy
description: Pennsylvania Department of Education-licensed CDL training provider on Veterans Hwy (PA-413) in Bristol near I-95 Exit 40, offering a 160-hour ELDT program with CDL attainable in about four weeks.

name: SSS CDL Driving Academy
description: CDL driving academy in Bensalem near the I-95 corridor offering full Class A and Class B training plus Passenger, Tanker and HazMat endorsements.
